query: SELECT name, isActive, description FROM products WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%chick%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%gozilla%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT name, isActive, description FROM products WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%chick%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%gozilla%' LIMIT 10;

rows.name: The Original ChickGozilla
rows.description: (non-veg) The one and only Original ChickGozilla. A giant, golden-fried chicken steak cooked to perfection. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. No frills, all flavour. Allergen: gluten.

rows.name: ChickGozilla with Molten Cheesy Corn
rows.description: (non-veg) The beast, unleashed. Our giant ChickGozilla gets the full treatment: a fiery Korean Gochujang glaze meets a glorious river of melted cheesy corn. This is maximum flavor, maximum crunch, and maximum satisfaction. Allergen: gluten, sesame

rows.name: ChickGozilla Power Salad
rows.description: (non-veg) Who says salads are boring? We top a power-packed mix of fresh garden vegetables with our famous ChickGozilla chicken. A drizzle of sweet and zesty honey mustard dressing makes this the most satisfying and delicious salad you'll ever have. All the crunch, all the flavour, all in one bowl. Allergen: gluten, mustard

rows.name: Original Japanese ChickGozilla Curry Rice
rows.description: (non-veg) Our signature ChickGozilla, chicken steak, served golden and crispy over fluffy Japanese rice, finished with a rich in-house Japanese curry simmered with aromatic spices for a smooth, mildly sweet, deeply comforting flavour. A hearty classic with a satisfying crunch in every bite. Allergen: dairy, gluten

rows.name: Coconut Japanese ChickGozilla Curry Rice
rows.description: (non-veg) Our signature ChickGozilla, chicken steak, served golden and crispy over fluffy Japanese rice, finished with a rich in-house Japanese curry simmered with aromatic spices for a smooth, mildly sweet, deeply comforting flavour. A hearty classic with a satisfying crunch in every bite. Allergen: dairy, gluten

A hearty classic with a satisfying crunch in every bite. Allergen: dairy, gluten
